howItWorksDesc: No appointments or waiting rooms—get guidance anytime, anywhere.
step1Desc: Type or speak your legal query in simple language. No complex legal terms required.
step2Desc: Our AI evaluates your query against Indian laws, regulations, and precedents.
step3Desc: Receive actionable advice that helps you understand your legal options clearly.
faqDesc: Have questions about JanSeva services? Click a question to view the answer.
faq1Question: Is JanSeva free for all citizens?
faq1Answer: Yes! Most services provided on JanSeva are free for Indian citizens.
faq2Question: Do I need to create an account to use JanSeva?
faq2Answer: Some features require signing in, but general information and search are accessible without an account.
faq3Question: Which services can I access through JanSeva?
faq3Answer: You can access legal guidance, healthcare information, education support, farmer schemes, and senior citizen aid.
faq4Question: Is the AI assistant a substitute for legal or medical professionals?
faq4Answer: No. The AI provides guidance and information but is not a replacement for professional legal, medical, or government advice.
faq5Question: How can I report an issue or provide feedback?
faq5Answer: Use the Contact or Help section on JanSeva to submit your queries or feedback.

faqPage.title: All FAQs
faqPage.faq1Question: Is JanSeva free for all citizens?
faqPage.faq1Answer: Yes! Most services provided on JanSeva are free of charge for Indian citizens.
faqPage.faq2Question: Do I need an account to use JanSeva?
faqPage.faq2Answer: Some features, like tracking your queries or submitting requests, require signing in. General information and searches are accessible without an account.
faqPage.faq3Question: Which services can I access through JanSeva?
faqPage.faq3Answer: You can access services related to legal guidance, healthcare, education support, farmer schemes, senior citizen aid, and citizen grievance reporting.
faqPage.faq4Question: How can I submit a complaint or feedback?
faqPage.faq4Answer: Use the Help or Contact section to submit complaints, suggestions, or feedback. You will receive a reference number for tracking.
faqPage.faq5Question: Can I track the status of my request or query?
faqPage.faq5Answer: Yes. After logging in, you can track the status of all your submitted requests or queries from the dashboard.
faqPage.faq6Answer: Yes. JanSeva uses secure encryption and follows strict privacy policies to protect all citizen data.
faqPage.faq7Question: Which government schemes are covered in JanSeva?
faqPage.faq7Answer: JanSeva provides information on central and state government schemes including health, education, agriculture, social welfare, and senior citizen benefits.
faqPage.faq8Question: Is the AI assistant a substitute for a professional?
faqPage.faq8Answer: No. The AI provides guidance and information, but it is not a replacement for professional legal, medical, or government advice.
faqPage.faq9Question: Can I access JanSeva on mobile?
faqPage.faq9Answer: Yes. JanSeva is mobile-friendly and works on all modern smartphones and tablets.
faqPage.faq10Answer: All Indian citizens seeking information or guidance about government services, legal help, healthcare, education, or social welfare can benefit from JanSeva.
